purpose: Compact predicate inventory scaffold for policy incident intake, QA mapping, and failure analysis.

predicates.notes: Temporal ordering relation for timestamps or event ids.
Records a boil-water notice issued to a zone at a time by an issuer.
Required deadline, in hours, for issuing a boil-water notice after the offline threshold.
Required deadline, in hours, for formally lifting a boil-water notice after the clean-reading condition.
Records that the boil-water notice was formally lifted at a time by an issuer.
Records emergency bypass activation time for a facility.
Records written bypass authorization by an officer at a time.
Maximum age in days for a Harbor Master inspection to count as current.
Roles that must jointly authorize emergency bypass.
Required separation between consecutive clean readings.
Maximum value for a reading to count as clean.
Authoritative coliform reading value, timestamp, and technician for an intake point.
Number of consecutive clean readings required before lifting a notice.
Records advisory status changes such as triggered or lifted.
Value above which a contamination advisory is triggered.
Records a source-stated correction without treating the original value as current truth.
Records a review disclosure or statement with explicit epistemic status, such as statement_not_finding.
Distribution or dependency relation from a zone to an upstream facility.
Offline duration that starts the boil-water-notice deadline during an advisory.
Facility identifier and type.
Timestamped facility state such as offline or online.
Required deadline for notifying Foundry Row of a contamination advisory.
Authoritative inspection record.
Zone classified as non-residential.
Notification recipient, type, timestamp, delivery method, and notifying actor.
Authoritative corrected arrival time for M. Okonkwo.
Person and official role.
Zone classified as residential.
Post-incident review meeting timestamp and participants.
Records a source-attributed claim, initial statement, allegation, or retracted value without promoting it to objective fact.
Required testing interval in hours for a condition.
